brief_notes: Polished paper. Numbers verified: 6M params, 128x128, 10% dropout, -15 to 15 deg, 0.1 threshold, 200 genes/spot filter, window size 5, 12 samples, 14 landmarks, 260 slices/20 landmarks, 4 annotated, 16 landmarks heart, 3 striatum samples, A100 GPU. Named citations throughout (sanchez2019object, bergenstrahle2021eggplant, etc.), 4-contribution statement, thoughtful discussion.
